segments.text: What if your mom had someone to talk to every day?
Good morning, Maggie! Did Emma ever get the hang of that bicycle?
She did! Rode all the way down the driveway. I made her my famous dumplings to celebrate.
Those dumplings really are legendary! Have you picked up a new mystery novel yet?
Not yet. I've been a little tired this week, to be honest.
Lonesome No More. Companionship for your loved ones. Peace of mind for you.
